name: Jenkins
effect: +12% output, -15% defensive reliability

name: Boomer
effect: -8% output, -25% death chance

name: Prog Andy
effect: +15% output on repeat attempts of the same dungeon, -10% on first attempt

name: Duo Queue
effect: +8% output when paired with the same teammate across 3+ consecutive runs

name: Casual Andy
effect: Output capped at 80% ceiling, never dies — reliable floor, limited upside

name: Drama Queen
effect: +15% output when timer is below 20% remaining OR 2+ deaths have occurred this run

name: Solo Player
effect: +10% output; party tactics points apply at half strength to this character's individual checks

name: Loot Goblin
effect: +15% output when the run's pre-rolled (hidden) loot contains an upgrade this character can equip

name: Tilted
trigger: Near-death (sub 5% HP) on key +10 or higher
effect: -10% output on keys above +14

name: Triggered
trigger: Near-death (sub 5% HP) on key +10 or higher
effect: -10% performance on the affix active when this triggered

name: Second Wind
trigger: Near-death (sub 5% HP) on key +10 or higher
effect: +15% output when below 30% HP

name: Hard Carry
trigger: Near-death (sub 5% HP) on key +10 or higher
effect: +10% output when 2+ teammates are dead

name: Standing in Fire
trigger: Significant avoidable damage from a specific affix on key +8 or higher
effect: -10% output on the affix that triggered this

name: Pool Dweller
trigger: Significant avoidable damage from a specific affix on key +8 or higher
effect: Always positions badly in Sanguine

name: Mechanic Master
trigger: Significant avoidable damage from a specific affix on key +8 or higher
effect: +8% damage resistance to that affix's damage type

name: Spatial Awareness
trigger: Significant avoidable damage from a specific affix on key +8 or higher
effect: +10% positioning reliability on all affixes

name: Burnout
trigger: First-time timing a key above +15, or 10+ consecutive timed keys on +8+
effect: -8% output on affixes they've cleared 5+ times

name: Cocky
trigger: First-time timing a key above +15, or 10+ consecutive timed keys on +8+
effect: +15% output, +20% death chance

name: Redemption Arc
trigger: First-time timing a key above +15, or 10+ consecutive timed keys on +8+
effect: +12% output in dungeons previously wiped in

name: Cracked
trigger: First-time timing a key above +15, or 10+ consecutive timed keys on +8+
effect: +5% to all stats

name: Survivor's Guilt
trigger: Last survivor of a full party wipe, or top performer 5 runs in a row — key +12+
effect: -10% output the run immediately following any wipe

name: Rival
trigger: Last survivor of a full party wipe, or top performer 5 runs in a row — key +12+
effect: +10% output, -15% morale if a specific teammate dies

name: Battle-Hardened
trigger: Last survivor of a full party wipe, or top performer 5 runs in a row — key +12+
effect: +8% max HP

name: Guild Leader
